name: Verastem, Inc.
summary: Verastem, Inc. is a commercial-stage biopharmaceutical company focused on developing and commercializing medicines for cancer. Its marketed product is AVMAPKI FAKZYNJA CO-PACK (avutometinib capsules; defactinib tablets). Its pipeline includes avutometinib (RAF/MEK inhibitor), defactinib (FAK inhibitor), and VS-7375 (a selective oral KRAS G12D dual ON/OFF inhibitor). The company conducts clinical trials including RAMP 201, RAMP 201J, RAMP 205, RAMP 301, and VS-7375 trials.
